name: Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the sweet potato clean and pierce it all over with a fork.
2. Place the sweet potato on a foil-lined sheet pan.
3. Bake in a 350 degree F. oven for 1 hour, turning after 30 minutes.
4. Continue baking until the sweet potato is tender when poked with a fork.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. Peel the cooled sweet potato and cut into chunks.
7. Pass through a food mill or puree in a food processor.
8. Add tablespoons of water until the desired consistency is reached.
Yield: about 1 1/2 cups pureed sweet potato
